title: Ensure Web Application Firewall access and security log service is  enabled

input_row.title: Ensure Web Application Firewall access and security log service is  enabled
input_row.description: Log Service collects log entries that record visits to and attacks on websites that are protected by Alibaba Cloud Web Application Firewall (WAF), and supports real-time log query and analysis. The query results are centrally displayed in dashboards.
input_row.rationale: The WAF access and security log shall be enabled to enable timely analytical investigation on visits to and attacks on your websites and help security engineers to develop protection strategies.
input_row.audit: Perform the following ensure the WAF access and security log is enabled: 1. Logon to WAF Console. 2. Choose App Market > App Management. 3. Click Configure in Real-time Log Query and Analysis Service. 4. On Log Service page, select the specific domain name of your website. 5. Ensure the Status switch on the right is turned on. 6. Ensure the log volume usage indicator is sufficient for log storage.
input_row.remediation: Perform the following ensure the Anti-DDoS access and security log is enabled: 1. Logon to WAF Console. 2. Choose App Market > App Management. 3. Select the region where your WAF instance is located. 4. Click Upgrade in Real-time Log Query and Analysis Service. 5. Enable Log Service. 6. Select the log storage period and the log storage size, and click Buy Now. 65 | P a g e 7. Return to the WAF Console and choose App Market > App Management, and then click Authorize in Real-time Log Query and Analysis Service. 8. Click Agree to authorize WAF to write log entries to your exclusive logstore. 9. Return to the WAF Console and choose App Market > App Management and then, click Configure in Real-time Log Query and Analysis Service. 10. On the Log Service page, select the domain name of your website that is protected by WAF, and turn on the Status switch on the right to enable WAF Log Service. These log entries can be queried and analyzed in real time.
input_row.impact: Extra charge will incur by enabling the log.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**PROGRAM NAME:** ali_waf_log_service_enabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
- Use the Alibaba Cloud API `GetLogServiceList` to check if the Log Service is configured for the Web Application Firewall (WAF).
- The Aliyun CLI command `aliyun waf DescribeLogService` can be utilized to retrieve the status of the Log Service for all configured WAF instances.
- Validate the specific WAF instance associated with the application to ensure it is in the "enabled" state for log services.
- The specific configuration property to validate is the `LogServiceStatus` for each WAF instance, which should be set to `enabled`.
- Clear Pass/Fail criteria:
  - **Pass:** Log Service is enabled (`LogServiceStatus` = `enabled`).
  - **Fail:** Log Service is not enabled (`LogServiceStatus` = `disabled`).

Summary:
The automated audit approach leverages Alibaba Cloud APIs and Aliyun CLI to programmatically verify the configuration of the WAF log services, allowing for efficient compliance checks against the CIS benchmark requirements.
